headline: Marriott International (MAR) Stock After Lefay Joint Venture And 10,000th Property Milestone Is Valuation Stretched Or Reasonable
summary: Marriott International (MAR) is drawing fresh attention after entering a joint venture to add luxury wellness brand Lefay to its portfolio, alongside opening its 10,000th property, JW Marriott Ranthambore Resort & Spa in India. See our latest analysis for Marriott International. These moves into luxury wellness and new high end resorts come as momentum in the stock is strong, with a 30 day share price return of 14.95% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 59.26% pointing to rising investor...

headline: What is the impact of the World Cup on the U.S. economy?
summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs estimates the 2026 FIFA World Cup could provide a temporary boost to U.S. employment, consumer spending, and inflation over the coming months, with the largest effects expected to appear in June.
